message:
Add unit tests for gateway br service (bd-1qrh)

Add comprehensive unit tests for br.service.ts covering:
- CRUD operations (ready, list, show, create, update, close)
- Sync operations (syncStatus, sync)
- Error handling and propagation
- Structured logging assertions
- Command runner and timeout behavior
- Input validation for create/update operations

41 tests with 88 expect() calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
